_doc: codexmd hook registration manifest. The Phase-3 installer MERGES these entries into ~/.codex/hooks.json managing ONLY codexmd's own entries (identified by the '/codexmd/' path marker in each command) — never reading, modifying, or depending on oh-my-codex or any other tenant, and working whether or not the file pre-exists or OMX is installed. Install = strip-own + preserve-all-others + append-own (idempotent); uninstall = strip-own + preserve-others. The installer replaces __CODEXMD_HOOKS_DIR__ with the absolute install path (must contain a '/codexmd/' segment so the marker resolves). Event names + entry shape match the Codex native hook contract (requires config.toml features.codex_hooks=true, which the installer sets append-only if absent). matcher 'Bash' scopes PreToolUse to Bash calls; SessionStart matcher 'startup|resume' matches Codex's two start kinds.
